<<<KOT:pentastomid>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"pentastomid is a technical zoological taxon name referring to a highly specialized parasitic arthropod group. Its identity depends on precise phylogenetic and molecular criteria (crustacean-derived, parasitic lifestyle, specific morphology) that cannot be grounded in the prime lexicon or existing catalog concepts without introducing technical zoological apparatus. The everyday sense is negligible; this belongs to the biology sector."}
<<<END:pentastomid>>>>

<<<KOT:pneumoencephalogram>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"pneumoencephalogram is a specialized medical imaging term and procedure artifact. Its essence depends on technical medical knowledge: the specific technique of cerebrospinal fluid drainage via lumbar puncture, replacement with contrast gas, and radiographic imaging. This historical medical procedure and its resulting image belong to the clinical-medical sector and cannot be adequately grounded in everyday prime concepts or the current catalog."}
